message:
test(bd-1kim): cover WebSocket frame edge cases and transport methods

Add 8 tests for fastmcp-transport websocket.rs covering Continuation
opcode roundtrip, unknown opcode rejection, as_text non-UTF-8 error,
WsTransport close/ping frame sending, WsClientTransport send
cancellation, binary frame skip, and pong frame skip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
